title: Ancient Egyptian Book of the Dead Contains 3,000-Year-Old Wite-Out
description: Learn about the surprising discovery that shows that even ancient Egyptians used Wite-Out to fix their mistakes.

title: Lukas prizes honor books on homelessness, the US Census and ancient India
description: Jeff Hobbs’ “Seeking Shelter” won the Lukas Book Prize.

title: 'Wealthy religous center': Mosaics, ancient Byzantine church discovered at Nitzana National Park
description: Dated to the Byzantine and Early Islamic periods (fifth to seventh century CE), the church is the sixth to be discovered at the site.

title: Did Ancient Storms Kill These Pterosaurs?
description: 500+ pterosaur fossils found at Solnhofen may be hiding a dark secret distorting our view of them.

title: Israeli officer 'seized ancient stone' during West Bank raid
description: An Israeli police officer has reportedly seized an ancient artefact during a raid on a Palestinian village in the West Bank;
